tools.name: get_my_profile
tools.title: Get my profile
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's Simulados profile: name, email, and access segment (guest, standard/aluno, or pro).

tools.name: list_simulados
tools.title: List simulados
tools.description: List the mock exams (simulados) the signed-in user can see, newest first. Includes title, status, question count, duration, and execution window.

limit.description: Maximum number of simulados to return. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: get_my_performance
tools.title: Get my performance summary
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's overall performance summary: total attempts and average, best and last scores.

tools.name: list_my_attempts
tools.title: List my attempts
tools.description: List the signed-in user's simulado attempts, most recent first, with status, score and answer counts.

limit.description: Maximum number of attempts to return. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: list_error_notebook
tools.title: List error notebook entries
tools.description: List the signed-in user's error notebook (caderno de erros) entries — questions they got wrong — newest first. Optionally filter by area. This is a PRO feature; non-PRO users see no entries.

area.description: Filter entries by medical area (e.g. 'Clínica Médica').

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Defaults to 20.
